metadata.page_title: Hedonic Crusade Slaanesh Cultist Army List

entries.scope: Noise Marine, Ravisher and Painlord formations

special_rules.name: Hedonic Crusade Epic Tournament Special Rules
special_rules.text: All formations in a Hedonic Crusade Slaanesh Cultist army owe allegiance to Slaanesh and may summon Daemonettes, Fiends of Slaanesh, Steeds of Slaanesh or Keeper of Secrets if they are unbroken and have Daemonic Pact. Lesser Daemons: Daemonettes 1, Fiends of Slaanesh 1, Steeds of Slaanesh 2. Greater Daemons: Keeper of Secrets 8.

special_rules.name: Fickle Masters
special_rules.text: In the strategy phase, if the Chaos player rolls a 6, add 1D3 lesser daemons to the Daemon Pool. If the Chaos player rolls a 1, remove D3 lesser daemons from the Daemon Pool. If no daemons remain in the Daemon Pool, there is no further effect.

special_rules.name: Summoned Units
special_rules.text: Chaos formations must declare allegiance before the battle. Unbroken formations with Daemonic Pact may summon daemons from the Daemon Pool by rolling 2D3 summoning points; the allegiance of the summoning formation determines what may be summoned. Summoned daemons are placed within 5cm of the formation, may not be chained, may not be placed in enemy zone of control or impassable terrain, and only one greater daemon of a given allegiance may be on the battlefield at once. Summoned units count as part of the formation that summoned them. Destroyed daemons are removed from play. If the formation is broken, all summoned daemons are removed from play. In the End phase, after rally tests, summoned daemons return to the Daemon Pool; war engine daemons keep their current DC when they return.

special_rules.name: Augmented Summoning
special_rules.text: Units with Augmented Summoning (+x) add x summoning points to the roll when the formation summons daemons.

special_rules.name: Daemonic Focus
special_rules.text: Units with Daemonic Focus may keep summoned units in play after the formation rallies, but not if the formation is broken.

formations.name: Knight Household
formations.units_text: Any three of the following units: Hell-Knight, Hell-Slicer
formations.upgrades_or_options_text: Add up to three Hell-Knights or Hell-Slicers for +65 points each; replace any number of Hell-Knights with an equal number of Hell-Scourges for +15 points each; add one Voluptuary character for +25 points or one Arch-Hedonist per army for +150 points
formations.raw_text: Knight Household | Any three of the following units: Hell-Knight, Hell-Slicer | Add up to three Hell-Knights or Hell-Slicers for +65 points each; replace any number of Hell-Knights with an equal number of Hell-Scourges for +15 points each; add one Voluptuary character for +25 points or one Arch-Hedonist per army for +150 points | 250 points

formations.name: Hell-Strider Household
formations.upgrades_or_options_text: Add up to three Hell-Striders for +50 points each; add one Voluptuary character for +25 points
formations.raw_text: Hell-Strider Household | Three Hell-Striders | Add up to three Hell-Striders for +50 points each; add one Voluptuary character for +25 points | 150 points

formations.name: Cultist
formations.units_text: One Demagogue or Chaos Marine Aspiring Champion and any eleven of Cultists or Mutants
formations.upgrades_or_options_text: Add up to eight Cultists or Mutants for +10 points each; add just enough Land Transporters to transport the entire formation for +10 points each; add Daemonic Pact to the formation and one Lesser Daemon to the Daemon Pool for +25 points; add one Icon Bearer character for +25 points; add up to three Debasers for +50 points each
formations.raw_text: Cultist | One Demagogue or Chaos Marine Aspiring Champion and any eleven of Cultists or Mutants | Add up to eight Cultists or Mutants for +10 points each; add just enough Land Transporters to transport the entire formation for +10 points each; add Daemonic Pact to the formation and one Lesser Daemon to the Daemon Pool for +25 points; add one Icon Bearer character for +25 points; add up to three Debasers for +50 points each | 175 points

formations.name: Debaser
formations.upgrades_or_options_text: Add up to two Debasers for +50 points each
formations.raw_text: Debaser | Four Debasers | Add up to two Debasers for +50 points each | 275 points

formations.name: Noise Marine
formations.units_text: Six Noise Marines, one with a Chaos Lord or Sorcerer Lord character
formations.upgrades_or_options_text: Add three Chaos Rhinos for +25 points; add Daemonic Pact to the formation and one Lesser Daemon to the Daemon Pool for +25 points; add one Icon Bearer character for +25 points; add one Champion of Slaanesh character for +50 points; add up to three Debasers for +50 points each
formations.raw_text: Noise Marine | Six Noise Marines, one with a Chaos Lord or Sorcerer Lord character | Add three Chaos Rhinos for +25 points; add Daemonic Pact to the formation and one Lesser Daemon to the Daemon Pool for +25 points; add one Icon Bearer character for +25 points; add one Champion of Slaanesh character for +50 points; add up to three Debasers for +50 points each | 275 points

formations.name: Hell Blade

formations.raw_text: Hell Blade | Three Hell Blades | 200 points

formations.raw_text: Hell Talon | Two Hell Talons | 225 points

formations.name: Daemon Pool
formations.cost: Greater Daemon +50 points each; Lesser Daemon +15 points each
formations.units_text: Greater Daemon markers (Keeper of Secrets); Lesser Daemon markers (Daemonettes, Fiends of Slaanesh, Steeds of Slaanesh)
formations.raw_text: Daemon Pool | Greater Daemon +50 points each; Lesser Daemon +15 points each

profiles.name: Demagogue
parse_warnings: The Demagogue row is line-wrapped in the source table; weapon rows were reconstructed conservatively.

profiles.name: Land Transporter
abilities_or_notes: May transport two infantry units without Jump Packs or Mounted.

profiles.name: Chaos Rhino
abilities_or_notes: May transport two infantry units (except Chaos Space Marine Terminators, Daemon Princes and Obliterators) without Jump Packs or Mounted.

profiles.name: Arch-Hedonist
parse_warnings: The Arch-Hedonist row is line-wrapped in the source table; weapon rows were reconstructed conservatively.

profiles.name: Keeper of Secrets
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: The unit is destroyed, all summoned units within 5cm are destroyed on a roll of 6+.
parse_warnings: The Keeper of Secrets row is line-wrapped in the source table; weapon rows were reconstructed conservatively.

profiles.name: Painlord Titan
abilities_or_notes: Armed with either an Energy Whip or a Plasma Cannon.
May step over units and pieces of terrain that are lower than the unit’s knees and less than 2cm wide.

Critical Hit Effect: The unit’s plasma reactor has been breached. Roll a D6 for each breach on the unit in the end phase of each turn. On a roll of 1 the unit is destroyed and all units within 5cm suffer a hit on a roll of 4+, and on a roll of 4–6 the breach has been repaired. Any breach not repaired causes one point of damage.
parse_warnings: The Painlord Titan row is line-wrapped in the source table; optional weapons were reconstructed conservatively.

profiles.name: Questor Titan
abilities_or_notes: May step over units and pieces of terrain that are lower than the unit’s knees and less than 2cm wide.

Critical Hit Effect: Move the unit D6cm in a random direction. If it moves into impassable terrain or another unit it can’t move over it will stop and suffer one point of damage. All units it moves into or over suffer a hit on a roll of 6+.

profiles.name: Ravisher Titan
abilities_or_notes: Armed with either a Close Combat Weapon or a Plasma Cannon.
May step over units and pieces of terrain that are lower than the unit’s knees and less than 2cm wide.

Critical Hit Effect: The unit’s plasma reactor has been breached. Roll a D6 for each breach on the unit in the end phase of each turn. On a roll of 1 the unit is destroyed and all units within 5cm suffer a hit on a roll of 5+, and on a roll of 4–6 the breach has been repaired. Any breach not repaired causes one point of damage.
parse_warnings: The Ravisher Titan row is line-wrapped in the source table; optional weapons were reconstructed conservatively.

profiles.name: Subjugator Titan
abilities_or_notes: May step over units and pieces of terrain that are lower than the unit’s knees and less than 2cm wide.

Critical Hit Effect: Move the unit D6cm in a random direction. If it moves into impassable terrain or another unit it can’t move over it will stop and suffer one point of damage. All units it moves into or over suffer a hit on a roll of 6+.

army_notes.name: Background
army_notes.text: The list is based on the Hedonic Crusade launched by House Devine in the early 41st Millennium.

army_notes.name: Datasheets
army_notes.text: The army uses datasheets from the Hedonic Crusade Forces section.

army_notes.name: Formations
army_notes.text: Formations are House Devine Households and vassal formations.

army_notes.name: Household / Vassal
army_notes.text: Each House Devine Household included allows any one vassal formation.

army_notes.name: Daemon Pool
army_notes.text: The army has a Daemon Pool.

army_notes.name: Chaos Navy / Engines
army_notes.text: Up to a third of points may be spent on Chaos Navy and War Engine formations.

army_notes.name: Artwork
army_notes.text: Page 3 is artwork only and contains no army data.

extraction_warnings: Confirmed existing repo list id: CHAOS_House_Devine_NETEA.
House Devine is the builder route used by the repo for this PDF; no new chooser route was invented.
Some formation option text is represented inline in the formation rows rather than as separate upgrade rows.
A few profile rows are line-wrapped in the source PDF and were reconstructed conservatively from the visible table text.
